summary: Iteration 30 - OTP Verification System Testing Complete. All 18 test features verified: Backend APIs (100% pass) and Frontend UI (100% pass). Registration creates pending_verification users, send-otp returns dev_otp, rate limits work (5 calls/min), verify-otp tracks attempts and activates accounts, login blocks pending_verification users. Frontend /inscription, /verification, /connexion pages render correctly with all required elements.

backend.register_creates_pending_verification: PASS - User created with status pending_verification, returns user_id and email
backend.register_rejects_duplicate_email: PASS - Returns 400 with 'attente de verification' message
backend.register_agent_sets_eligible_trusted_bad: PASS - Agent/auteur roles set eligible_trusted_badge=true and requested_role
backend.send_otp_returns_dev_otp: PASS - Returns 6-digit dev_otp in dev mode
backend.send_otp_rate_limit_5_per_minute: PASS - Returns 429 after 5 calls per minute
backend.verify_otp_correct_code_activates_accoun: PASS - Returns token and user with status=active
backend.login_succeeds_for_verified_user: PASS - Returns token and user object
backend.admin_stats_verified_unverified_counts: PASS - Returns verified_users, unverified_users, pending_verification counts

frontend.inscription_page_renders: PASS - All required elements present (fullname-input, email-input, password-input, role buttons, register-submit-btn)
frontend.verification_page_renders: PASS - OTP input boxes (6 digits), verify-otp-btn, resend cooldown timer, dev-otp-display
frontend.register_verify_flow_e2e: PASS - Registration -> redirect to verification -> OTP entry -> success animation -> redirect

critical_code_review_comments: OTP hashing with SHA-256 is correctly implemented in auth.py
Rate limiting works at both middleware level (30/min global) and per-endpoint level (5/min for send-otp)
Attempt tracking correctly decrements and shows remaining attempts in error message
Agent/auteur registration correctly sets role=visiteur, requested_role, and eligible_trusted_badge=true
OTP verification for professional roles correctly sets status=pending (not active) for admin approval
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed users created during testing, cleaned up via TestCleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: OTP verification system fully tested and working. Dev mode returns dev_otp in response for testing. Rate limiting: global 30/min on auth endpoints via middleware, plus per-email 5/min on send-otp. OTP stored hashed (SHA-256) in otp_codes collection with max_attempts=5 and 5min expiry. Professional roles (agent/auteur) get status=pending after verification for admin approval.

mocked_apis.note: Resend email service not configured - OTP returned in dev_otp field (expected dev mode behavior)
